externalHits.description: Security advice for users and maintainers to help reduce the impact of the next supply chain malware attack.   The post  Strengthening supply chain security: Preparing for the next malware campaign  appeared first on  The GitHub Blog .

recommendation.label: 建議升級

externalHits.title: How a Poisoned Security Scanner Became the Key to Backdooring LiteLLM
externalHits.description: On March 24, 2026, threat actor known as TeamPCP published backdoored versions of the litellm Python package after stealing PyPI credentials via a compromised Trivy GitHub Action in LiteLLM's CI/CD pipeline. Here's what happened, how the three-stage malware works, and how to check if you're affected.

Here's what happened, how the three-stage malware works, and how to check if you're affected.

items.name: OpenClaw

negativeSignals: OpenClaw 生態更新快，跨版本跳升容易牽動 provider parser 與 gateway 行為。

recommendation.label: 已最新
why: 目前版本已達最新或超前。

featureSuggestions: 先看新 release 是否改善 provider/tool-call compatibility，再安排灰度升級。
OpenClaw 升級前一定先看 provider / tool-call compatibility，尤其 MiniMax 與 Telegram 輸出鏈。
如果 release notes 涉及 gateway / parser / protocol，先做本機 smoke test，不要直接上 production。
items.summary: 2026.3.31 → v2026.3.31；OpenClaw 生態更新快，跨版本跳升容易牽動 provider parser 與 gateway 行為。；Nodes/exec: remove the duplicated `nodes.run` shell wrapper from the CLI and agent `nodes` tool so node shell execution always goes through `exec host=node`, keeping node-specific capabilities on `nodes invoke` and the dedicated media/location/notify actions. / Plugin SDK: deprecate the legacy provider compat subpaths plus the older bundled provider setup and channel-runtime compatibility shims, emit migration warnings, and keep the current documented `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*` entrypoints plus local `api.ts` / `runtime-api.ts` barrels as the forward path ahead of a future major-release removal. / Skills/install and Plugins/install: built-in dangerous-code `critical` findings and install-time scan failures now fail closed by default, so plugin installs and gateway-backed skill dependency installs that previously succeeded may now require an explicit dangerous override such as `--dangerously-force-unsafe-install` to proceed.
nextActions: 先做 provider/tool-call smoke test，再決定要不要升級 gateway

OpenClaw/Clawdbot has 1-Click RCE via Authentication Token Exfiltration From gatewayUrl
OpenClaw affected by denial of service through unguarded archive extraction allowing high expansion/resource abuse (ZIP/TAR)

recommendation.label: 已最新

items.name: firecrawl-cli

negativeSignals: web scraping 生態近期有供應鏈污染案例，快更新不一定更安全。

recommendation.label: 觀察等待
why: 抓取工具更新很快，先觀察社群與安全訊號，再安排灰度升級。

featureSuggestions: 抓取類工具升級前要先查供應鏈與封鎖風險，不要用最新版本直接進 production pipeline。
items.summary: 1.9.8 → 1.12.2；web scraping 生態近期有供應鏈污染案例，快更新不一定更安全。
nextActions: 先觀察社群與供應鏈訊號，暫不追最新

notes: 主代理優先穩定與工具相容性，不要讓 Telegram 輸出鏈再吃到文字化 tool call。
Coder 任務先選 coding 強且工具穩的模型，本地 coder 模型適合低風險 smoke。
研究代理可偏向長推理與中文能力，但 beta / experimental 要保守驗證。
輕任務與巡檢代理優先成本效率，必要時直接退到本地小模型。
審核/結構化流程建議偏保守模型，避免不穩定 reasoning beta。
驗收與稽核應重視穩定性，fallback 優先選擇輸出乾淨的模型。
